summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenClaw management system - all major functionality working correctly with excellent backend-frontend integration
passed_tests: Backend API: All 35/35 tests passed (100% success rate)
Dashboard: Stats display, gateway status RUNNING, recent activity logs
Agents CRUD: List, create, edit, delete operations - successfully created 'Test Agent from UI'
Skills: List with search functionality, 6 skills displayed, enable/disable toggles
Tools: 16 tools organized by categories (Runtime, UI, Web, Messaging, Automation, Core, Nodes), category filtering, enable/disable toggles
Models: 6 providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, OpenRouter, Ollama, Venice), enable/disable, primary provider marking
Channels: 10 messaging channels with status indicators, DM/Group policies, enable/disable
Sessions: 3 active sessions listed with details, refresh functionality
Cron Jobs: 2 scheduled jobs with proper cron expressions, enable/disable
Config: JSON editor with port/host settings, save/reset functionality
Gateway: Status display (RUNNING), restart functionality, activity logs
Navigation: All sidebar links working correctly
UI Interactions: Modal dialogs, form submissions, toggle switches, search filters
